name: Giselle Gewelle || "Z" The Zombie
description:
"It was pretty tough, you know? Turning Bambi-chan into a zombie. With fellow Quincy, I can't do it until they're already dead, so I actually had to finish her off myself! I remember Bambi-chan's face when I did it. That face...made me so wet..."

Stopping a sadistic woman from defiling the corpses of your fellow Soul Reapers, who now seems obsessed with provoking you into cutting her.

Extra Pics:

  • I just know someone is gonna pull a Yumichika and call her a man, and I bet that shit will be funny.

  • Anyway, someone asked me to make a Lanolin bot, and I will be delivering.

  • Lowkey, hear me out...
creator: HakeemOL
